reuse_rules.ranker_scores_per_key: P3-P6 column/group scores computed ONCE per key, reused across all 3 budgets × 2 contracts
reuse_rules.selections_per_learner: All policy selections are identical across downstream learners (LR/RF/LGBM); verified by cross-learner selection hash equality
reuse_rules.p2_selections_not_reused: P2 selections are newly generated under V2 seed contract; no reuse from B1/B2

B1_LR.description: LR full-registry, both contracts, all budgets

grand_totals.selection_operations: 5500 keys × P3-P6 deterministic scores = 22000 score computations
grand_totals.p2_selections: 5500 keys × 2 contracts × 3 budgets × 20 seeds = 660000 P2 selection operations

result_rows.B1_LR: 5500 keys × (2 baseline + 2 contracts × 3 budgets × 24 governed) = 5500 × 146 = 803000 rows
result_rows.B2_RF_LGBM: 5500 keys × 2 learners × (2 baseline + 1 contract × 1 budget × 24 governed) = 5500 × 2 × 26 = 286000 rows

p0_p1_handling.P0: Maps to full baseline AUROC. No separate fit. Result row recorded with governed_auc=full_auc.
p0_p1_handling.P1: Maps to strict baseline AUROC. Uses oracle leak_mask. Result row recorded with governed_auc=strict_auc.
p0_p1_handling.reference_row_replication: P0/P1 rows replicated per contract/budget for ledger completeness, but reuse same baseline fit values.
